ingest.notes: photo-heavy estate with multi-terabyte raw payloads

processing.notes: metadata extraction and selective OCR first

retention.notes: long-lived raw archives plus warm derived analytics

waves.why: strong exportability and high unlock value
large byte volume but high sovereignty gain
higher workflow friction and manual handling

assumptions: active collaboration collections stay hot longer
archive-only progress is tracked separately from cutover progress
phase_gate_recommendation: Proceed to Phase 2 planning approval; do not start full ingest until archival tiers and processing budget are approved.
